head.title: Care, Empathy, and the Big Beautiful Bill

title: Care, Empathy, and the Big Beautiful Bill
featuredImageAlt: Stock image of a small frog climbing vertically up a wet window pane
body: Whose empathy is really being weaponized? Read my essay, [“Trump and the GOP don’t care about health care providers”](https://www.salon.com/2025/07/29/trump-and-the-gop-dont-care-for-health-caregivers/), in Salon.
